proposals.reasoning: The line 'Section 700 (59602) Management of Engineering Systems Spring 2026 - College Station' is descriptive text providing course details, not a distinct section header, and should be demoted to body text. The 'Late Work Policy' section contains only a single sentence that is a direct quote of a university-wide student rule (Student Rule 7); if this section consistently appears with only this institutional text, its header should be stripped as boilerplate. The sentence 'NB: Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not considered late work and is exempted from the late work policy (Student Rule 7).' is explicitly noted as a verbatim repetition, so the second instance should be removed. The string '5 th ' appears to be a parsing artifact and should be corrected to '5th' for proper formatting.
